description_long: This bungalow complex features multiple single-story residential units arranged within neatly defined green lawns and hedges. The buildings have a modern architectural style, characterized by flat roofs, large glass windows, and clean geometric lines. Outdoor spaces include patios, a small pool, and landscaped gardens with trees and shrubs. The property is divided into separate sections, each with its own entrance and driveway, and some areas are covered with pergolas or glass canopies. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, contrasting with the lush green surroundings. The overall layout suggests a private, upscale residential environment with ample outdoor living space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped gardens, divided into distinct residential sections.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow complex from an elevated angle, highlighting the main building, green lawns, and a small pool in the rear section.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, revealing the separation between the two main residential units and the extensive garden areas.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a direct look at the entrances and driveways, with visible patios and a glass-covered outdoor area.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the rear and side facades, emphasizing the flat roofs, large windows, and the division between the units.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
